proposals.issue: confidence consistently at or above 0.95 — possible over-confidence
proposals.proposed_change: Add explicit uncertainty language to the agent's output instructions. Require the agent to list at least one counter-argument or limitation in every finding.

proposals.issue: quality gate pass rate is 0% over 12 findings (threshold: 0.7)
